prestazioni: Hybrid powertrain upgrade with a custom-tuned Honda/Toyota-sourced **JNC-35** (3.5L twin-turbo V6) ECU reflash via **Hondata KPro V4**, targeting 650 WHP (stock block) with **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbos, **PRL Motorsports** billet aluminum intercooler, and **Injector Dynamics ID1050x** fuel injectors, paired with a **Motec M150** standalone for hybrid system integration and torque vectoring optimization

Full **Penske 8760** 3-way adjustable coilover suspension with **NSX-specific spherical bearing top mounts** and **SuperPro** poly bushings, paired with **AP Racing CP9450** 380mm front/356mm rear 2-piece rotors and **Ferodo DS3000** pads for endurance-level braking performance

Dual **AEM 340LPH** in-tank fuel pumps with **Radium Engineering** surge tank and **XRP** -8AN/-6AN braided lines, feeding a **Tial MV-R** 44mm wastegate and **TurboSmart** Kompact 50mm BOV, while the **NSX Type S-exclusive SH-AWD** system is recalibrated via **KW Suspensions** adaptive damper tuning for 0.98g lateral grip on **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (255/35/19 front, 305/30/20 rear) tires
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB NSX Type S** widebody kit with **carbon fiber fenders, rear diffuser, and GT-style rear wing**, featuring **Vorsteiner** carbon fiber side skirts and **Seibon** carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors

**Voltex** Type 3 rear wing with **adjustable carbon fiber gurney flaps** and **3D-printed titanium mounting brackets**, paired with **Varis** front lip spoiler and **custom LED taillight overlays** by **Diode Dynamics** for JDM-inspired aesthetics

**Recaro SP-G TS** carbon Kevlar seats with **Schroth Profi II-6** 6-point harnesses, **MOMO** carbon fiber steering wheel with **AiM MXL2** data display, and **custom titanium shift knob** by **Titanium Creations**, while the **NSX Type S-exclusive titanium exhaust tips** are replaced with **Akrapović** titanium dual 100mm outlets
